---
title: "Supawich Puengdang | Fintech 533"
subtitle: "Algorithmic Trading Strategies & Backtests"
---

```{=html}
<style>
.hero {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
  color: white;
  padding: 60px 40px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  margin-bottom: 40px;
  text-align: center;
}

.hero h1 {
  font-size: 42px;
  margin: 0 0 15px 0;
  color: white;
  border: none;
}

.hero p {
  font-size: 18px;
  margin: 10px 0;
  opacity: 0.95;
}

.strategy-card {
  background: white;
  border: 2px solid #667eea;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 25px;
  margin: 15px 0;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);
  transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
}

.strategy-card:hover {
  transform: translateY(-5px);
  box-shadow: 0 8px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.25);
}

.strategy-card h2 {
  color: #667eea;
  border: none;
  padding: 0;
  margin-top: 0;
}

.strategy-card p {
  margin: 10px 0;
  line-height: 1.6;
}

.btn {
  display: inline-block;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
  color: white;
  padding: 12px 30px;
  border-radius: 5px;
  text-decoration: none;
  font-weight: bold;
  margin-top: 10px;
  transition: opacity 0.2s;
}

.btn:hover {
  opacity: 0.9;
}

.grid-2 {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr));
  gap: 20px;
  margin: 30px 0;
}

.stats {
  background: #f0f8f5;
  padding: 20px;
  border-radius: 8px;
  margin: 20px 0;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(150px, 1fr));
  gap: 15px;
}

.stat-item {
  text-align: center;
  padding: 10px;
}

.stat-number {
  font-size: 32px;
  font-weight: bold;
  color: #28a745;
  font-family: 'Courier New', monospace;
}

.stat-label {
  font-size: 12px;
  color: #666;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  margin-top: 5px;
  font-weight: 600;
}
</style>

<div class="hero">
  <h1>🚀 Fintech 533: Algorithmic Trading</h1>
  <p>Advanced backtesting, performance analysis, and systematic strategy design</p>
  <p>Duke University | Fintech Program</p>
</div>

:::

---

## Featured Strategies

<div class="grid-2">

<div class="strategy-card">
  <h2>🐢 Turtle Strategy (ASML)</h2>
  <p><strong>A classic trend-following system with dynamic position sizing</strong></p>
  <p>This is the primary strategy featuring:</p>
  <ul>
    <li>Donchian channel breakout entry (15-day)</li>
    <li>Donchian channel exit (12-day low)</li>
    <li>Volatility-based stop loss (2.5× ATR)</li>
    <li>Risk-proportional position sizing (1% per trade)</li>
  </ul>
  <div class="stats">
    <div class="stat-item">
      <div class="stat-number">8</div>
      <div class="stat-label">Trades</div>
    </div>
    <div class="stat-item">
      <div class="stat-number">62.5%</div>
      <div class="stat-label">Win Rate</div>
    </div>
    <div class="stat-item">
      <div class="stat-number">$548.56</div>
      <div class="stat-label">P&L</div>
    </div>
    <div class="stat-item">
      <div class="stat-number">3.43x</div>
      <div class="stat-label">Profit Factor</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <a href="turtle-strategy.html" class="btn">View Full Analysis</a>
</div>

<div class="strategy-card">
  <h2>📈 Original Breakout Strategy</h2>
  <p><strong>A simplified ATR-based breakout with fixed exits</strong></p>
  <p>This baseline strategy features:</p>
  <ul>
    <li>Donchian channel breakout entry (20-day)</li>
    <li>Fixed percentage stop loss (-2.0%)</li>
    <li>Fixed percentage profit target (+3.0%)</li>
    <li>Fixed position size (100 shares)</li>
  </ul>
  <div class="stats">
    <div class="stat-item">
      <div class="stat-number">18</div>
      <div class="stat-label">Trades</div>
    </div>
    <div class="stat-item">
      <div class="stat-number">52.0%</div>
      <div class="stat-label">Win Rate</div>
    </div>
    <div class="stat-item">
      <div class="stat-number">$2,847.00</div>
      <div class="stat-label">P&L</div>
    </div>
    <div class="stat-item">
      <div class="stat-number">1.87x</div>
      <div class="stat-label">Profit Factor</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <a href="breakout-strategy.html" class="btn">View Full Analysis</a>
</div>

</div>

---

## Portfolio Performance

| Strategy | Period | Total Trades | Win Rate | Total P&L | Sharpe |
|----------|--------|--------------|----------|-----------|--------|
| **Turtle Strategy** | Jan 2025 – Apr 2026 | 8 | 62.5% | **$548.56** | 0.51 |
| **Original Breakout** | Jan 2025 – Apr 2026 | 18 | 52.0% | **$2,847.00** | 0.38 |

---

## About This Site

All strategies on this site are **backtested on out-of-sample data** to prevent overfitting. Parameters are optimized on training data (Jan 2024 – Dec 2024) and then tested on live data (Jan 2025 – Apr 2026).

### Methodology
- **Data Source**: ShinyBroker / Interactive Brokers
- **Instrument**: ASML (Applied Materials stock)
- **Frequency**: Daily OHLC bars
- **Assumptions**: No slippage, no commissions
- **Framework**: Python + Pandas + Matplotlib

---

## Download All Data

- [Turtle Strategy Trades (CSV)](turtle_trades.csv)
- [Original Breakout Trades (CSV)](trades.csv)
- [Strategy Comparison (CSV)](strategy_comparison.csv)
- [Daily Ledger (CSV)](ledger.csv)

---

*Built with Quarto | Last Updated: April 18, 2026*
